hero.title: Corporate Tax UAE
hero.description: Organize UAE corporate tax periods, user-entered adjustments, obligations, and estimate assumptions in a private workspace.

flow.title: Tax Periods → Adjustments → Obligations → Insights
steps: Create tax periods with entity and financial-year details
Record user-entered taxable-income adjustments and assumptions
Track obligations and review estimate-only insights

differences.title: Keep tax planning records organized without replacing professional review
differences.description: Corporate Tax UAE is a private record-keeping workspace for estimates and preparation notes, not a filing or advisory product.

items.title: Structure the filing year
items.description: Save entity, financial year, filing date, profit, revenue, status, and assumption details.

items.title: Make assumptions visible
items.description: Capture user-entered increases and decreases to taxable income with reference notes and review status.

items.title: Track external work
items.description: Record deadlines, adviser review, filing preparation, payment, document collection, and completion outside Ansiversa.

feel.title: A calm preparation workspace for UAE business records
feel.description: The app keeps estimates transparent, groups currencies, and reminds users that authoritative sources and qualified professionals remain required.

items.title: Transparent
items.description: Calculations show basis, assumptions, thresholds, rates, and estimate labels.

items.title: Private
items.description: All records are scoped to the authenticated user.

items.title: Bounded
items.description: The app does not provide legal, accounting, audit, filing, or tax advice.

audiences.title: Who uses Corporate Tax UAE
audiences.description: Useful for UAE businesses that want a structured planning record before professional review or external filing.

items.title: Small businesses
items.description: Keep periods, adjustment notes, and obligations in one protected workspace.

items.title: Finance teams
items.description: Prepare user-entered schedules for adviser review without treating them as official filings.

items.title: Founders
items.description: Track deadlines and assumptions alongside supporting notes.

resourceSection.title: Corporate tax workspace essentials
resourceSection.description: V1 focuses on records, estimates, and task tracking with clear safety boundaries.

items.title: Tax periods
items.description: Financial year, entity identity, revenue, accounting profit, taxable estimate, currency, and status.

items.title: Adjustments
items.description: User-entered categories, direction, amount, reference, explanation, and treatment review status.

items.title: Obligations
items.description: Due dates, priority, responsible person, completion date, and external references.

groupedSection.title: From records to review-ready estimates
groupedSection.description: The workflow keeps calculations defensible by separating entered facts, assumptions, and external review status.

items.name: Financial year
items.description: Capture the relevant period and filing due date.

items.name: Assumptions
items.description: Store the rate, threshold, effective date, and reference note used for estimates.

items.name: Currency grouping
items.description: Totals are grouped by currency to avoid silent conversion.

items.name: Professional review
items.description: Records indicate whether user-entered treatments need adviser review.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with Ansiversa workflow standards
technicalSection.description: Corporate Tax UAE uses protected routes, owner-scoped APIs, isolated persistence, shared UI patterns, and estimate-only tax safeguards.
items: Tax outputs are labelled estimates and calculated only from stored user records.

finalCta.title: Open Corporate Tax UAE
finalCta.description: Start with Tax Periods, then add adjustments, obligations, and estimate-only insights.
